name: Naka-Rushton contrast fit for unit-001
fit_parameter_documentation: R = R_max * c^n / (c50^n + c^n) + B. R_max = saturating response above baseline; c50 = semi-saturation contrast; n = exponent; B = baseline response.

derived.sensitivity_definition: 1 / contrast at which response first exceeds 5 SD of blank
